---
title: "ACCEPT Lab"
body-classes: home
toc: false
---

::: {.hero}
<p class="hero-affiliation">School of Psychological Sciences · Te Herenga Waka — Victoria University of Wellington</p>
<h1 class="hero-title">ACCEPT Lab</h1>
<p class="hero-descriptor">Observational causal inference for psychological science</p>
<p class="hero-lede">We develop and apply causal inference methods to questions in psychology, culture, and social life. We also build research tools, teach these methods, and collaborate widely.</p>
<div class="hero-actions">
<a href="research.qmd" class="btn btn-primary">Research</a>
<a href="resources.qmd" class="btn btn-secondary">Methods & resources</a>
<a href="mailto:joseph.bulbulia@vuw.ac.nz" class="btn btn-secondary">Contact</a>
</div>
:::

## Research

We develop and teach methods for observational causal inference, including targeted learning, causal forests, and sensitivity analysis for unmeasured confounding. We apply these methods to questions about culture, religion, and social life, studying how belief, practice, community structure, and cultural setting shape behaviour and wellbeing across populations and time.

[Methods paper series](resources.qmd#start-here-methods-in-causal-inference-series) · [Research overview](research.qmd)

## Places Map

[Places Map](https://www.placesmap.org/) maps places of worship worldwide for reproducible spatial and cultural analysis, supporting research and public scholarship.

[Visit Places Map](https://www.placesmap.org/) · [Code](https://github.com/go-bayes/places-of-worship)

## Collaboration and teaching

The lab supports graduate supervision, methods teaching in causal inference, and applied collaboration with researchers, institutions, and policy partners. We welcome enquiries.

::: {.home-links}
[Meet the lab](team.qmd) · [Presentations and talks](presentations.qmd) · [News](news.qmd) · [Reports](reports.qmd)
:::

::: {.home-affiliation-line}
Affiliated with the [Centre for Applied Cross-Cultural Research](https://www.wgtn.ac.nz/cacr) · [School of Psychological Sciences](https://www.wgtn.ac.nz/psyc) · [GitHub](https://github.com/go-bayes)
:::
